introSection: Wildcat was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Elitch Gardens in Denver, Colorado, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride closed with the park in 1994. It remained standing but not operating until it was demolished on January 25, 1999.

fullText:
Wildcat was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Elitch Gardens in Denver, Colorado, USA.

The ride closed with the park in 1994. It remained standing but not operating until it was demolished on January 25, 1999.
